Figure 2: The Clinical Global Impression-Severity scale scores on the screening visit (t0) and after three months (t90) for the study and control groups. Figure 3: The Clinical Global Impression- Improvement scale scores after three months (t90) for the study and coNtrol groups. Discussion There is a bizarre phenomenon related to antidepressants which is not typical for the other psychotropic drugs. Antidepressants are commonly used in the absence of clear evidence-based indications21. texts.full_text: ple Velvet Cloak Lined in Purple Satin This long hooded cloak is made from a deep purple velvet material (fairly lightweight) and then entirely lined in a slightly lighter-colored purple satin, including the hood. It has shaped shoulders and closes in front with a long tie made from the same purple velvet material. The cloak is floor-length and has a dramatic, flowing design. It is perfect for Renaissance fairs, medieval reenactments, or for anyone who wants to add a
